headline: AI Stocks Worth Adding to Your Portfolio for Healthy Returns
summary: Here, we have picked three AI stocks, MU, TER and NVDA, which are well-poised to benefit from AI's growing use and ability to solve complex problems.

headline: KLA Jumps 22% in 3 Months: Is There More Room for the Stock to Grow?
summary: KLAC shares jump 21.7% in three months despite a softer fiscal Q3 outlook, as strong AI infrastructure spending and accelerating advanced packaging demand support growth.

headline: AEIS Soars 98% in the Past Six Months: Is the Stock Worth Buying Now?
summary: Advanced Energy stock surges nearly 98% in the past six months, powered by AI-driven semiconductor and data center demand, new products and expansion plans.

headline: KLA Likely to Raise Financial Targets, Reaffirm Structural Growth, Oppenheimer Says
